name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Restored lotSize/accountSize/leverage/risk on long_position widget create — without them TV defaults to fractional contract qty (~0.42) and shows wrong $-amounts/R:R. accountSize=lotSize×entry×$20 makes TV's internal qty formula resolve to qty=lotSize ($20/pt × ticks × contracts on NQ). Earlier: bare-minimum create-call payload (no top-level `text:` or `disableSave:`) to avoid silent null returns from TV's stricter 2026-05-08 widget validator; header text applied via setProperties post-create; unified win/loss geometry; trail line at placed stop; 5-step heatmap zone palette; pyramid size in header; halt amber recolor; exit_reason suffix.
